reviews.review_description:
UPDATED REVIEW 
Please note this review has now been updated to 5 stars as the developers had addressed all my issues. It's good to see the mixed reality option reinstated. 

The communication and feedback from the development team is A+. I feel the developers are humble and really go out of their way to rectify any issues. 

I can now wholeheartedly recommend this app to anyone who would love to play carom  board in VR/MR. 

Highly recommended.  Well done👍

The graphics are basic the controls are basic, the game itself has great physics. 

Those who do not know what the game is, think pool, shuffleboard and finger football mixed together. It is fun. 

Although multiplayer does not work as random.  I am unable to test private match with friends.
 
Devs you’re missing out on a huge opportunity here for hand tracking!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the detailed feedback! 😊
We’re glad you enjoyed the physics and gameplay. Improved graphics, local multiplayer, and full hand-tracking support are already in the works for the next major update. Stay tuned — exciting things are coming soon!

reviews.review_description: Awesome game of carrom! Devs are really on top of their game.

I have same problem with multi player feature. Connection to other player not working. Hope this is fixed quickly, refund will not be available after a certain amount of time. Like the game and will keep if fixed.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience. We understand how important the multiplayer feature is and we’re happy to let you know that the issue has now been resolved. 🎉

You can play seamlessly with your friends or even with new players by using Oculus Invites.

We really appreciate your patience and are glad to hear you’re enjoying the game — we’re committed to making Real Carrom the best multiplayer Carrom experience in VR.

– The Real Carrom Team

reviews.review_description:
This is a great job done thank you dev for a fantastic layout and game play.
Very well made vr game with great quality graphics.
I'm just wondering if it's possible that you could add a function to spin the table? 
The up and down function of the table is great but would like to see it spin.

Please keep up the fantastic quality work you have done on this great game.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review, we will try to include spinning functionality in the next update.

reviews.review_description: Enjoy the game although the multiplayer connection didn’t work.  We can create a room, get notification however unable to connect.  Any suggestions?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Real Carrom and for your feedback!

We truly appreciate your support and understand that connecting to a multiplayer match can be challenging at times. Since the game is currently in Early Access, our player base is still growing. Right now, we have a 2-player multiplayer mode, but due to the limited number of players online at the same time, matchmaking may not always be immediate.

As we continue to grow and more players join, matchmaking will improve significantly. Additionally, once we reach a larger player base, we plan to introduce 4-player multiplayer to enhance the experience further.

We appreciate your patience and support in this early stage! In the meantime, we’d love for you to invite friends to play together for a smoother multiplayer experience. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or suggestions!

Happy gaming! 🎯

reviews.review_title: Playing this in roomscale space is fun
reviews.review_description: Happy to discover a carrom game has come out for Quest. There is potential for this to become worthy of five stars when the aiming mechanic is improved and when there is a way to move your perspective sideways by using the controller instead of actually walking to the left and right (roomscale is the perfect space to play until the developer enables lateral movement using a controller). The aiming arrow should be lengthened a bit to make aiming less frustrating. Also the setting control for raising the table sometimes is buggy. AI opponents are very skilled.

developer_response.body: Hi realrick, Thanks for the feedback we will improve aiming mechanics and movement in the next update along with new game modes.

reviews.review_description:
It’s the best developed game that I might imagine a developer would do 
So many great features 
Tutorial is so helpful 
Setting are done in a wonderful way 
Mixed reality is appreciated 
Much fun 
Highly recommended 
Thank you

developer_response.body: Hi Yousef thanks for the review. We will add more features in future updates.

reviews.review_description: During multiplayer one or the other player suddenly gets booted out of the game after just a few turns?

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, We will fix it in the next update

reviews.review_description:
While the physics of the game are great. It’s buggy and the menu clunky. The height and distance sliders don’t work well and moving one will reset the other. Also the settings don’t save and I find myself having to select hand preference everytime I boot up the game. 

Hopefully they patch it soon or someone else publishes Carrom but better done

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, we will resolve the bugs and update it soon

reviews.review_description: Fun to play with friends and playing with ai is awesome

reviews.review_title: Realistic Carrom board Experience in VR
reviews.review_description:
Absolutely thrilled with this new VR carrom board game! The controls are a breeze - you'll be a pro after just one tutorial. I took on the AI in Single Player Hard mode and was astounded by the challenge; it's a tough opponent but incredibly fun. The avatars and environment are visually appealing and add to the immersive experience.

The multiplayer mode is a standout feature. I teamed up with a friend, and thanks to seamless voice chat, it felt like we were playing in the same room. We enjoyed an hour-long session without any lag or interruptions - pure, uninterrupted gameplay.

Although the 'join random' feature had limited availability due to the game's recent release, the potential for expanding the player community is exciting. This game is a must-try for fans of turn-based and board games. It's not just a game; it's a virtual gathering spot for friends and a challenging arena against AI. Don't miss out on this enthralling VR carrom board experience!

reviews.review_title: Faithful VR adaptation with few hiccups
reviews.review_description:
The physics seem to be pretty realistic and AI offers a good challenge for a long time. It is clear that the developers love and care about carrom a lot.

Tutorial was unskippable in a weird way where you even had to wait a set amount of time (a fairly long while) for a "next" button to appear in the tutorial window. Also some of the shots in the tutorial required a lot of precision in order to be able to advance to next part of the tutorial. Even though I was fairly spot on according to the tutorial helper elements, it took a few tries to line up the shots properly.

With increased precision for hand tracking in Quest 3, I am hoping the devs will try implementing a fling mechanic that takes advantage of hand tracking as a way to play the game. Now it uses controller with that typical pool game method of first lining up the shot and then selecting the power of the shot. It is not done with motion controls, which is a shame. It's pretty much the only part of the gameplay that breaks the realism.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review we will implement this feature in the upcoming next update.
